name: 3peak
description: 3peak is a leading high-performance analog chip design company in China, focusing on the research and development of high-performance, high-quality analog integrated circuits. Founded in 2012 and headquartered in Suzhou, 3peak's products cover signal chain chips and power management chips, widely used in industrial control, automotive electronics, communication equipment, consumer electronics and other fields.
longDescription: As an authorized 3peak distributor, LiTong provides comprehensive support for 3peak's extensive portfolio of high-performance analog solutions. 3peak (思瑞浦) is a leading analog chip design company in China, founded in 2012 and headquartered in Suzhou, with R&D centers in Shanghai, Shenzhen, Beijing and overseas. The company focuses on high-performance signal chain chips and power management chips, serving industrial control, automotive electronics, communication equipment, consumer electronics and other fields. 3peak is one of the few domestic companies with full-category signal chain chip capabilities, with products including amplifiers, ADCs/DACs, interface chips, voltage references, power management, etc. The company has passed IATF 16949 automotive quality system certification, and many products have been widely used in mainstream domestic and foreign customers.
seoDescription: Authorized 3peak distributor offering operational amplifiers, ADCs/DACs, interface chips, and power management solutions. Technical support and competitive pricing for analog applications.

faqs.question: What are 3peak's main product categories?
faqs.answer: 3peak offers six main product categories: Operational Amplifiers (precision, high-speed, low-power), ADCs and DACs (high-precision data converters), Interface Chips (RS485/422/232, CAN, I2C level shifters), Voltage References (high-precision, low-noise), Power Management ICs (LDOs, DC-DC converters), and Motor Drivers (stepper, DC motor drivers). These products serve industrial control, automotive, communications, and consumer markets.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find the right 3peak solution for your analog signal processing needs.

faqs.question: How do I select the right operational amplifier?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right 3peak op-amp depends on your application requirements: For precision applications (sensor signal conditioning, instrumentation), choose TP156x series with low offset and drift. For high-speed applications (video, communications), choose TP167x series with high slew rate and bandwidth. For low-power/battery applications, choose TP15xx series with microamp quiescent current. For automotive applications, choose AEC-Q100 qualified variants. Consider supply voltage, input/output range, and package size in your selection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Precision: TP156x, High-speed: TP167x, Low-power: TP15xx, Automotive: AEC-Q100 variants.

faqs.question: What support does LiTong provide for 3peak products?
faqs.answer: As an authorized 3peak distributor, LiTong provides comprehensive support including product selection guidance for analog applications, reference design review and customization assistance, SPICE model support for simulation, evaluation board provision, supply chain management and inventory planning, competitive pricing and volume discounts, fast delivery from local stock. Our FAE team has deep expertise in analog signal chain design and power management.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE team for design assistance and product recommendations.

faqs.question: Are 3peak products suitable for automotive applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, 3peak offers AEC-Q100 qualified products for automotive applications. These include operational amplifiers, voltage references, power management ICs, and interface chips specifically designed for automotive environments. Products feature extended temperature range (-40°C to +125°C), enhanced EMC performance, and meet automotive reliability standards. 3peak has passed IATF 16949 certification and supplies to major automotive Tier 1 and OEM customers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Look for AEC-Q100 qualified products for automotive applications. Contact FAE for automotive grade recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the precision of 3peak ADCs and DACs?
faqs.answer: 3peak offers data converters with various precision levels: 12-bit ADCs/DACs for general-purpose applications, 16-bit for higher precision requirements, and 24-bit for precision measurement applications. The TPCxxx series offers excellent linearity (INL/DNL) and low noise performance. Specific precision depends on the model - check datasheets for detailed specifications including effective number of bits (ENOB) and signal-to-noise ratio (SNR).
faqs.decisionGuide: 12-bit for general, 16-bit for precision, 24-bit for measurement. Check ENOB and SNR specs.

faqs.question: Does 3peak provide reference designs and evaluation boards?
faqs.answer: Yes, 3peak provides comprehensive reference designs including schematics, PCB layouts, and application notes for all major product categories. Evaluation boards are available for op-amps, ADCs/DACs, interface chips, and power management ICs. These resources help accelerate your development and ensure optimal performance. LiTong, as an authorized distributor, provides these reference designs and evaluation boards with technical support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request reference designs early in your development cycle. Evaluation boards help validate performance.

faqs.question: How do 3peak op-amps compare to international brands?
faqs.answer: 3peak op-amps offer competitive performance compared to international brands like TI, ADI, and Maxim. Key advantages include: comparable electrical specifications (offset voltage, bandwidth, slew rate), better supply availability and shorter lead times, local technical support in Chinese, cost advantages for high-volume applications, and customization options for specific requirements. Many customers have successfully replaced international brands with 3peak in industrial and automotive applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: 3peak offers equivalent performance with better availability and local support. Good for import substitution.

faqs.question: What interface standards are supported?
faqs.answer: 3peak interface products support major industrial and automotive standards including: RS-485/RS-422 (half/full duplex, various speeds), RS-232 (standard and low-power variants), CAN bus (CAN 2.0B, CAN FD), I2C level shifters and buffers, SPI isolators, and LVDS/MIPI interfaces. Products feature robust ESD protection, wide common-mode range, and fault-tolerant operation for harsh industrial environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: Check specific model for your interface standard. All major industrial interfaces supported.
